name: Tutti-Fruitticake
recipeIngredient: 1 lb shelled Brazil nuts (3 cups) or pecan halves (4 cups)
1 tsp vanilla extract or rum extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the dates and cut the pineapple into chunks. Combine with the whole cherries and nuts.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients, then add to the fruits and nuts, coating everything well.
3. Stir in the eggs and vanilla (or rum) until combined.
4. Line two 8 x 4 x 2-inch loaf pans with heavy paper. Grease the paper lightly.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
6. Bake in a slow oven (325°F) for 1 hour or until done.
7. Cool.
